title: Faz's Mob Armor
description: Add Armors of Mobs in Minecraft
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f5175e138332e11e71a649eefe72d14a164f65b.png)
About Faz's Mob Armor
Faz's Mob Armor is an exciting mod for Minecraft that adds a unique twist to the game by introducing armor sets inspired by the mobs you encounter. Each set is crafted using materials dropped by different mobs, and each piece of armor grants special abilities and buffs, making combat even more strategic and rewarding.

The mod features a variety of armor sets, each tailored to a specific mob type. For example, the Creeper Armor provides an explosive resistance and an ability to charge up a devastating blast, while the Skeleton Armor allows you to automatically shoot arrows at high speed. Other sets, like the Enderman Armor, grant teleportation abilities, and the Spider Armor improves your agility and climbing speed.

With Mob Armor Renewed, not only can you protect yourself, but you can harness the powers of the very mobs you battle. This mod adds an extra layer of excitement to survival gameplay, as you'll need to hunt down specific mobs to unlock the powerful benefits of each armor set.

                                           I can put this in Modpacks?
Of course! Feel free to add this mod to your modpacks. I encourage you to do so, just don't forget to give credit.

                                                   What's in the Mod
Mob Armor Renewed introduces armor sets based on a variety of mobs in Minecraft:

-Pig Armor

-Cow Armor

-Sheep Armor

-Villager Armor

-Witch Armor

-Zombie Armor

-Spider Armor

-Skeleton Armor

-Zombie Pigman Armor

-Enderman Armor

-Iron Golem Armor

-Blaze Armor

-Bee Armor

-Warden Armor

-Dolphin Armor

-Slime Armor

-Guardian Armor
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/16c850649c65ee5b5cc07415d3ffc451716674fd_0.webp)

Crafting Recipes

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ecd5902cd3dec61606be4864f88408ffad1b88e8.png)
                        

                                                Armor Abilities
Pig Armor – Eating a normal or golden carrot grants you Speed.

Cow Armor – Removes potion effects, provides infinite milk, and grants Resistance.

Sheep Armor – Eating hay gives you Jump Boost, Regeneration, and Speed.

Villager Armor – Improves trade prices.

Witch Armor – Allows you to throw potions with a stick.

Zombie Armor – Grants increased health and resistance.

Spider Armor – Enhances agility and climbing.

Skeleton Armor – Automatically shoots arrows at high speed.

Creeper Armor – Allows you to explode TNT with a right-click and removes all explosion damage.

Iron Golem Armor – Provides high-level Resistance, Slowness, and Strength.

Blaze Armor – Grants Fire Immunity and allows you to throw fire charges.

Zombie Pigman Armor – Makes any gold tool enchanted to the max level and grants Strength.

Enderman Armor – Teleports you to the location you’re looking at.

Warden Armor – Grants Strength and the ability to use Sonic Boom, but gives permanent Blindness.

Bee Armor – Provides extreme Agility and Slow Falling, and allows you to grow crops with right-click.

Dolphin Armor – Grants increased swimming speed and Water Breathing.

Slime Armor – Makes you bounce upon landing and grants Jump Boost.

Guardian Armor – Grants Water Breathing and Laser Beam attack.

Each set brings its own unique abilities to enhance your gameplay.
